Our approach

We don't sell packaged solutions.
We solve your actual problem.

Most consulting firms show up with a framework they built for someone else and charge you to watch them apply it. We don't work that way.

McNees Group starts with your problem. We assemble a team that has the specific expertise your challenge requires, from energy policy to organizational design to emerging technology. The experts change. The rigor doesn't.

We work with organizations that want real answers, not comfortable ones. If you need someone to validate a decision you've already made, we're probably not the right fit. If you need to understand what's actually happening and what to do about it, call us.

Built for your problem

Every engagement starts fresh. We assemble the right experts for your specific challenge, not a pre-packaged team.

Deep network, small footprint

A core leadership team with access to world-class specialists across medicine, engineering, AI, sustainability, policy, and business strategy.

Economics-first thinking

Every recommendation is grounded in market logic and measurable outcomes. Not trends. Not theory. Results.

Accountable to outcomes

We measure what matters. If a solution doesn't hold up to rigorous scrutiny, we say so before you find out the hard way.

What we do

Three ways we work with you

Whether you need policy guidance, an innovation breakthrough, or a keynote that changes how your audience thinks, we bring the same discipline to every engagement.

01

Energy policy advisory

The rules around energy infrastructure, data center load, and ratepayer accountability are changing fast. We help utilities, corporations, and investors understand what the policy landscape means for their business and what to do about it.

Grid economics Load accountability Rate structure Regulatory strategy
02

Innovation sprint facilitation

A focused 2 to 3 day engagement that moves your organization from stuck to solved. We bring systems thinking, design thinking, and the right subject matter experts to your hardest problem and leave with a clear path forward.

Systems thinking Design thinking Expert network 2-3 day format
03

Keynote speaking

Dr. McNees speaks on corporate accountability, energy economics, and what market-based thinking actually looks like in practice. Audiences leave with a sharper understanding of the forces shaping their industry and a clearer frame for making decisions.

Corporate accountability Energy economics Innovation leadership Policy impact

Leadership

Dr. Mark McNees

Dr. Mark McNees Managing Consultant, McNees Group

Dr. Mark McNees is the Managing Consultant of McNees Group and Director of Social and Sustainable Enterprises at Florida State University's Jim Moran College of Entrepreneurship. He works at the intersection of corporate accountability, energy policy, and market-based innovation.

His core argument is straightforward: companies should not be allowed to externalize costs while internalizing profits. That principle shows up in his policy work, his speaking, his writing, and every engagement McNees Group takes on.

He has been quoted in USA Today, published in The Hill, The Invading Sea, and other national outlets, and is a frequent voice on the economics of AI energy demand and utility rate accountability. He hosts the InNOLEvation Mindset podcast, with over 100,000 views and 122 episodes featuring conversations with FSU's top innovators and entrepreneurs.

With an estimated 5,000 presentations across his career and a network spanning 16 academic disciplines, he brings both the intellectual depth and the platform to move organizations forward.

The CEO's Mindset Reset, Vol. 1 — Published 2026
The CEO's Mindset Reset, Vol. 2 — Forthcoming June 2026
The Forever Founder — Forthcoming August 2026
